title: EaglercraftX
description: Experience Minecraft in your browser! Build, explore, and survive in this web-based version of the beloved block-building game.

title: Kevin Klicker
description: Click on Kevin Allen to earn points! How many clicks can you get? An addictive clicker game with upgrades and progression.

title: Whack-A-Kevin!
description: Kevin pops out of holes - click him before he disappears! A fast-paced whack-a-mole style game with increasing difficulty.

title: Space Tetris
description: Classic Tetris with a cosmic twist! Arrange falling blocks to clear lines in this space-themed puzzle game with glowing effects.

title: Space 2048
description: Slide numbered tiles to combine them and reach 2048! A space-themed version of the addictive puzzle game.

title: Slope
description: Control a ball rolling down a steep slope! Avoid obstacles and see how far you can go in this fast-paced endless runner.

title: Color Memory Game
description: Test your memory by remembering the sequence of colors. A fun brain training game that gets progressively more challenging!

title: WebRTC Pong
description: Play Pong against a friend in real-time using WebRTC! No servers needed - connect peer-to-peer via copy/paste codes.

title: Roulette
description: Spin the wheel and test your luck! Place bets on red, black, numbers, or ranges. European Roulette with animated wheel.

title: HexGL
description: A futuristic racing game built with HTML5 and WebGL. Race through stunning 3D tracks at breakneck speeds!

title: Rutted
description: An immersive Godot-based game. Navigate challenging terrain and obstacles in this browser-powered adventure!

title: Cosmic Blackjack
description: Classic casino Blackjack with a space theme! Beat the dealer to 21, manage your credits, and track your stats. Supports Double Down and all standard rules.

title: Video Poker
description: Classic Jacks or Better video poker! Hold your best cards and draw for winning hands. Royal Flush pays 800x!

title: Scratch-Off Lottery
description: Interactive scratch-off tickets! Click or drag to reveal symbols and match 3 to win big prizes. The more you bet, the more you can win!

title: Cosmic Slots
description: Classic 3-reel slot machine with spinning reels! Match symbols across the payline for huge multipliers. Hit the jackpot with triple diamonds!
